chapters.title: Welcome to C
chapters.description: Start your journey with the mother of all modern languages.

chapters.title: Variables & Types
chapters.description: Learn how C stores data deep in memory.

chapters.title: Operators & Expressions
chapters.description: Perform math and logic at blazing speed.

chapters.title: Control Flow
chapters.description: Make decisions using if/else and switch.

chapters.title: Loops
chapters.description: Automate repetitive tasks with while and for loops.

chapters.title: Functions
chapters.description: Break complex code into reusable blocks.

chapters.title: Arrays & Strings
chapters.description: Store multiple items and manipulate text.

chapters.title: Pointers
chapters.description: Unlock C's superpower: direct memory access.

chapters.title: Structures & Unions
chapters.description: Create custom data types to model real-world concepts.

chapters.title: Memory & Files
chapters.description: Master dynamic memory allocation and file handling.
